originalTitle: The floatable, powerful Soundcore Boom 2 speaker is over half off
summary: Bluetooth speakers with big sound and great features are hard to find for under $100, with most offerings being some variation of the same basic (and often small) design. Thankfully, through July 10th Woot has the Anker Soundcore Boom 2 on sale for $69.99, which is $20 cheaper than the discounted price at other retailers […]
content: Bluetooth speakers with big sound and great features are hard to find for under $100, with most offerings being some variation of the same basic (and often small) design. Thankfully, through July 10th Woot has the Anker Soundcore Boom 2 on sale for $69.99, which is $20 cheaper than the discounted price at other retailers like Amazon, and about half its original $129.99 price. The waterproof Bluetooth speaker can run for up to 24 hours on a single charge, with big, bass-forward sound that’s great for a day by the water or just hanging out in the yard. [Product: Anker Soundcore Boom 2 | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://electronics.woot.com/offers/new-anker-soundcore-boom-2-ipx7-waterproof-bluetooth-speaker] While size isn’t everything when it comes to Bluetooth speakers, the Soundcore Boom 2’s 50W subwoofer and pair of 15W tweeters should deliver louder, clearer sound than other speakers around the same price (which are often smaller). The IPX7 rating means it’s fully waterproof and submersible, and its design will let it pump out the tunes, or take calls with its built-in microphone, while it floats in water. The Boom 2 has a robust set of features for a speaker at this price point. You can adjust the equalizer and the built-in lighting behavior from the Anker app, plus the speaker charges your other devices at up to 5W from its built-in USB-A port. Its support for Anker PartyCast 2.0 lets the Boom 2 sync with other Anker speakers for larger audio. There’s no 3.5mm aux input, which isn’t irregular for waterproof speakers, so it’s Bluetooth only for playback.
chineseTitle: 可漂浮、功能强大的 Soundcore Boom 2 扬声器折扣超过一半
chineseSummary: 声音大、功能强大的蓝牙扬声器很难在 100 美元以下找到，大多数产品都是相同基本（通常很小）设计的一些变体。值得庆幸的是，截至 7 月 10 日，Woot 的 Anker Soundcore Boom 2 售价为 69.99 美元，比其他零售商的折扣价便宜 20 美元 [...]
chineseContent: 声音大、功能强大的蓝牙扬声器很难在 100 美元以下找到，大多数产品都是相同基本（通常很小）设计的一些变体。值得庆幸的是，截至 7 月 10 日，Woot 的 Anker Soundcore Boom 2 售价为 69.99 美元，比亚马逊等其他零售商的折扣价便宜 20 美元，约为原价 129.99 美元的一半。这款防水蓝牙扬声器一次充电可运行长达 24 小时，具有强劲的低音前向声音，非常适合在水边度过一天或只是在院子里闲逛。 [产品：Anker Soundcore Boom 2 | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https:// electronics.woot.com/offers/new-anker-soundcore-boom-2-ipx7-waterproof-bluetooth-speaker] 虽然对于蓝牙扬声器而言，尺寸并不是一切，但 Soundcore Boom 2 的 50W 低音炮和一对 15W 高音扬声器应该能提供比蓝牙扬声器更响亮、更清晰的声音其他扬声器的价格大致相同（通常较小）。 IPX7 等级意味着它完全防水且可浸入水中，其设计使其能够在漂浮在水中时发出音乐或使用内置麦克风接听电话。对于这个价位的扬声器来说，Boom 2 拥有一系列强大的功能。您可以通过 Anker 应用程序调整均衡器和内置照明行为，此外扬声器还可以通过内置 USB-A 端口以高达 5W 的功率为您的其他设备充电。 Boom 2 支持 Anker PartyCast 2.0，可与其他 Anker 扬声器同步以获得更大的音频。没有 3.5 毫米辅助输入，这对于防水扬声器来说并不常见，因此它只能通过蓝牙播放。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
